item.text: I’ll use the email tools only for this thread, then pull customer/company context, policy as needed, and calendar availability before taking any scheduling action.

The requested demo time in the thread is Friday, July 17, 2026 at 2:00 PM Central, which is already in the past as of today, July 20, 2026. I’m checking CRM and scheduling policy before deciding whether to draft a follow-up or take another workflow action.

arguments.query: scheduling demo policy past requested time calendar availability propose times
scheduling demo policy past requested time calendar availability propose times

item.text: The scheduling rules say to use the account owner’s calendar and propose alternatives if the requested time cannot be used. The availability tool needs timezone-aware bounds, so I’m querying Jordan’s calendar with explicit offsets.

Jordan’s calendar returned one near-term available slot in Central time, but it is on July 20. I’m checking the next week as well so the draft does not rely on a same-day slot that may be impractical.

There are no future slots returned for Jordan after July 20 in the requested range, and the original requested time was in the past. I’m checking prior related emails once to avoid missing a broader scheduling context before drafting a follow-up.

I have enough context now: Eli and Dana are BrightPath prospect contacts, Jordan owns the account, and the requested slot is no longer schedulable because it is before July 20, 2026. I’m creating a draft that asks for updated times and confirms Dana will be included, instead of scheduling a past meeting.

arguments.body:
Hi Eli,

Thanks for confirming. The Friday, July 17 at 2:00 PM Central slot has already passed, so could you and Dana send over a few updated times that work for the demo?

I’ll make sure Dana is included once we have a current time to schedule.

Best,

Hi Eli,

Thanks for confirming. The Friday, July 17 at 2:00 PM Central slot has already passed, so could you and Dana send over a few updated times that work for the demo?

I’ll make sure Dana is included once we have a current time to schedule.

Best,

item.text: Draft created for `sched_001`. It asks Eli and Dana for updated demo times because the requested Friday, July 17, 2026 slot has already passed, and confirms Dana will be included.
